u4_3.name: Onboarding Bootstrap Script — THE MAGIC INSTALL

phasesDelivered.name: SCAN
phasesDelivered.description: Detects connectors via /connectors/*/SKILL.md, MCP servers via .mcp.json + env, APIs via fetch/axios patterns in codebase, custom skills via skills/ tree walk, business data sources via entity references + warehouse.db detection, env vars via known patterns (NMI_SECURITY_KEY, SLACK_BOT_TOKEN, etc.)

phasesDelivered.name: ORGANIZE
phasesDelivered.description: Moves orphaned skills INTO connectors/neptune/skills/, creates missing PLAYBOOK.md + SKILL.md + GRAPH-TAG.json for each connector, updates master-registry.json with all discovered actions

phasesDelivered.name: ANALYZE
phasesDelivered.description: Reads AGENTS.md / README for business context, identifies domains via keyword clustering (12 domains: billing P0, customer-support P0, disputes P0, compliance-audit P0, deploy-vercel-github P1, engineering P1, agent-orchestration P1, reporting P1, vps-ops P1, marketing P2, HR P2, vercel-discipline P1), maps domains to connector availability matrix, generates priority list

phasesDelivered.name: AUTHOR PLAYBOOKS
phasesDelivered.description: For each detected domain generates playbook-<domain>.md using strict template (Operational Context + Toolbox + Hardened Workflows + Custom Skills + Best Practices + Anti-Patterns + Routines), generates routines.json per domain with connector-specific and cross-connector routines, generates workflow stubs (YAML), updates PLAYBOOK-ROUTER.md with new routes

phasesDelivered.name: WRITE NEPTUNE.MD
phasesDelivered.description: Updated 50-line traffic controller with connector status table, domain routes, cardinal rules, self-healing integration, bootstrap instructions

phasesDelivered.name: SMOKE TEST
phasesDelivered.description: Verifies each new playbook loads cleanly (frontmatter + sections), tests 3 random routines fire correctly (valid structure with id + steps + connectors), confirms system prompt injection works (PLAYBOOK-ROUTER has entry point + protocol)

phasesDelivered.name: REPORT
phasesDelivered.description: Generates /home/hermes/data/bootstrap_complete.json with full inventory, sends Slack notification to #jarvis-admin: 'Bootstrap complete. X connectors organized. Y playbooks authored. Z routines wired.'

cardinalsUpheld: ✓ IDEMPOTENT — safe to re-run, never deletes existing playbooks
✓ NEVER deletes existing playbooks — only adds/extends
✓ Pattern A+1 maintained (7 tools max reference)
✓ NO VPS Python edits or pm2 reloads (cardinal 6a153d63)
✓ Self-healing requires explicit user approval — never auto-mod

architecture.selfHealingLoop: User message → Agent reads PLAYBOOK-ROUTER → Loads playbook → Executes routine → Annotation collector logs outcome + sentiment → If failure pattern detected (in-session): Agent proposes playbook mod to user → User approves → agent edits playbook → reloads. If failure pattern detected (cross-session): Weekly digest cron surfaces it → Queues proposal for next user session.
architecture.bootstrapDiscoveryTree: Bootstrap script → Scan filesystem → Scan env vars → Scan AGENTS.md → Scan codebase → Cluster by business domain → Organize into connectors/neptune/ → Generate playbooks per domain → Wire PLAYBOOK-ROUTER → Smoke test → Report
architecture.annotationFlow: Execution → collectAnnotation (type: execution) → If sentiment detected: collectSentimentAnnotation (type: sentiment) → If mod triggered: collectModAnnotation (type: in_session_mod) → Weekly: digest aggregates → Slack + file persistence

closingStatement: U4 BOOTSTRAP + SELF-HEALING MASTER MISSION COMPLETE. All 3 phases (U4.1 In-Session Self-Healing, U4.2 Weekly Digest Cron, U4.3 Onboarding Bootstrap Script) shipped. The 2 remaining gaps from the user's playbook-first vision summary are now closed. Self-healing with explicit user approval is active — agents detect frustration/error patterns, propose playbook modifications with diff preview, and user approves/rejects. Weekly digest cron surfaces cross-session failure patterns every Monday. Bootstrap script enables one-command onboarding: pnpm neptune:bootstrap discovers, organizes, analyzes, and authors complete playbook domains. All cardinal rules honored. Both Chat and V2 deploys ready. Proof JSON 8KB+. Full playbook-first vision: COMPLETE.
